dialog.stepLabel: Unknown (83): "You see a few newborn kittens huddle together, and their mot..."

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You see a few newborn kittens huddle together, and their mother stands nearby as if she knows why you came.

items.speaker: Informant
items.text: You must be from the Kitty Rescue Team? I was the one who provided the lead about the mother cat. The kittens have arrived so early and the mother didn't even run away this time.

items.speaker: Bystander
items.text: I have some food with me. We should give them something to eat.

items.speaker: Informant
items.text: Can I take these two home with me? They would be the perfect company for my cat at my place. It’ll make it easier for Xiaoju, too.

items.speaker: Bystander
items.text: I'll take this one. It's been licking my hand the whole time. So cute!

options.text: Okay, then I'll take the last one.
